name: 完形填空 · 第二辑（阅读的力量）
desc: 说明文完形，7 个空，练一般现在时 + 词义搭配 + 副词选择（中考完形高频点）。每空带全文面板。免费档。

m5.why: 主语 It 第三人称单数、一般现在时，用 opens（与后面 makes 并列）。
m5.passage: Reading is a good habit. It ①___ your mind and makes you smarter. Some students think reading is ②___, but once they find a book they like, they cannot stop. You do not need to read fast — just read a little ③___ day. When you meet a new word, try to ④___ its meaning from the sentence around it. ⑤___ by little, your English will get ⑥___. If you keep reading every day, you will ⑦___ make progress.

m5.why: but once…cannot stop 是转折，前面应是负面词 boring（枯燥）。
m5.passage: Reading is a good habit. It ①___ your mind and makes you smarter. Some students think reading is ②___, but once they find a book they like, they cannot stop. You do not need to read fast — just read a little ③___ day. When you meet a new word, try to ④___ its meaning from the sentence around it. ⑤___ by little, your English will get ⑥___. If you keep reading every day, you will ⑦___ make progress.

m5.q: 第 ③ 空应选：（每天）
m5.why: every day = 每天；one day 意为「某一天」，the/some day 也不表「每天」，故选 every。
m5.passage: Reading is a good habit. It ①___ your mind and makes you smarter. Some students think reading is ②___, but once they find a book they like, they cannot stop. You do not need to read fast — just read a little ③___ day. When you meet a new word, try to ④___ its meaning from the sentence around it. ⑤___ by little, your English will get ⑥___. If you keep reading every day, you will ⑦___ make progress.

m5.why: 遇到生词、根据上下文——guess its meaning（猜词义）。
m5.passage: Reading is a good habit. It ①___ your mind and makes you smarter. Some students think reading is ②___, but once they find a book they like, they cannot stop. You do not need to read fast — just read a little ③___ day. When you meet a new word, try to ④___ its meaning from the sentence around it. ⑤___ by little, your English will get ⑥___. If you keep reading every day, you will ⑦___ make progress.

m5.q: 第 ⑤ 空应选：（___ by little 逐渐地）
m5.why: 固定短语 little by little = 一点一点地、逐渐地。
m5.passage: Reading is a good habit. It ①___ your mind and makes you smarter. Some students think reading is ②___, but once they find a book they like, they cannot stop. You do not need to read fast — just read a little ③___ day. When you meet a new word, try to ④___ its meaning from the sentence around it. ⑤___ by little, your English will get ⑥___. If you keep reading every day, you will ⑦___ make progress.

m5.why: 坚持读书英语会变好——get better（越来越好）。
m5.passage: Reading is a good habit. It ①___ your mind and makes you smarter. Some students think reading is ②___, but once they find a book they like, they cannot stop. You do not need to read fast — just read a little ③___ day. When you meet a new word, try to ④___ its meaning from the sentence around it. ⑤___ by little, your English will get ⑥___. If you keep reading every day, you will ⑦___ make progress.

m5.why: 语气积极——will surely make progress（一定会进步）；never/hardly/seldom 都是否定，语义相反。
m5.passage: Reading is a good habit. It ①___ your mind and makes you smarter. Some students think reading is ②___, but once they find a book they like, they cannot stop. You do not need to read fast — just read a little ③___ day. When you meet a new word, try to ④___ its meaning from the sentence around it. ⑤___ by little, your English will get ⑥___. If you keep reading every day, you will ⑦___ make progress.
